title: boechera perennans subsp. perennans
intro: Boechera perennans subsp. perennans, also known as the Wyoming rockcress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include potential uses in reducing inflammation and pain, as well as its possible effects on the cardiovascular system and immune system. Boechera perennans subsp. perennans can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
